title: KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026 Important Dates

detail.title: KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026 Important Dates
detail.short_info: KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026 application has started on 07 May 2026. Check Kurukshetra University UG Admission 2026 important dates, eligibility criteria, application fee, merit list schedule and apply online before the last date 31 May 2026.

content.text: KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026 application process has started. Kurukshetra University (KUK) has opened online applications for various Under Graduate, Integrated, and Apprenticeship Embedded Degree Programmes (AEDP) in University Teaching Departments/Institutes for the academic session 2026.

Kurukshetra University (KUK), a prestigious A++ NAAC-accredited institution in Haryana, has announced the admission notification for UG and Integrated programmes for 2026. Candidates can apply online for courses like B.A. LL.B. (Hons.), BBA (Hons.), BHM&CT, ITEP, B.Com (Professional) AEDP, BCA (Industry Linked) AEDP, and many more. This comprehensive guide covers all key details including important dates, eligibility, application fee, seat matrix, and step-by-step process to help aspirants secure admission.

sections.heading: Overview of KUK UG & Integrated Admissions 2026
KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026 Important Dates

rows: First List Fee & Document Verification Deadline
Second List Fee & Document Verification Deadline
Final List Fee & Document Verification Deadline
Supernumerary Seats Fee & Document Verification Deadline

sections.heading: KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026 Eligibility Criteria

content.text: Note: Check specific department eligibility in the official Handbook of Information (HBI-UG-UTD-2026).

sections.heading: How to Apply for KUK UG and Integrated Course Admission 2026

items: Visit the official admission portal: iums.kuk.ac.in
Register with valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form with personal, academic, and reservation details.
Submit and download the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Programmes Offered, Seat Matrix & Fee Details

content.text: Refer to Chapter-2 of the official handbook for complete list. Popular programmes include:

items: Seats include All India Category (AIC), Haryana General (HGC), EWS, SC, BC, DA, and supernumerary seats (Kashmiri Migrants, Sports, NCC, NSS, International Students, etc.).
Reservations as per Haryana Government norms.
Merit prepared on the basis of 10+2 marks (details in Chapter-6 of HBI).
Document verification and fee deposition required after merit list.

sections.heading: Documents Required for KUK UG Admission 2026

items: Any other relevant certificates (Sports, NCC, etc.)
